economic_mechanism: A scheduled Federal Reserve Beige Book release may resolve qualitative regional-growth uncertainty without changing the policy rate, so neutral pre-release SPY regimes may exhibit lower next-five-session realized range than outcome-independent prior neutral controls.
candidate_or_family_scope: Exact BEIGE_BOOK_RANGE_COMPRESSION_SPY_IC_21D_V1 / BEIGE_BOOK_INFORMATION_RESOLUTION_RANGE_COMPRESSION: official Federal Reserve Beige Book archive dates from 2013-01-01 through 2025-12-31; prior completed HV20 <= 0.30 and absolute prior 60-session return <= 0.12; next-session-open through fifth-session range; deterministic prior-only neutral controls outside every source-covered event +/-5-session band; future conditional one-lot 18-24 DTE $2-wide SPY iron condor only. capital_fit_usd=200; planning structural max_loss_usd=200 before credit/closing friction; max_lots=1.
falsifier: Close the exact family if the chronological first 60% has fewer than 30 matched pairs, fewer than six release years, control support below 80%, non-positive mean paired five-session range compression after a 20-bps hurdle, non-positive one-sided 90% release-year-block bootstrap lower bound, hurdle-adjusted compression positive frequency below 55%, event range p90 above 7%, or any official-source, chronology, feature-lag, event/control overlap, reuse, source-coverage, holdout-seal, option-pricing, or strict-JSON integrity violation.

strategy_advancement.summary: The exact Beige Book information-resolution range-compression mechanism failed its frozen population-consistency gate at 27/55 positive train pairs (49.0909% versus the required 55%) and remains closed at F0. No F1, L1, living leader, capital seat, registry, paper, shadow, arm, broker, funding, or live authority was earned.

search_information.summary: The wake froze 104 official archive events, separated partial official time corroboration from next-session availability, built a train-only prior-control lab with a sealed 38-blueprint holdout and zero option marks, exposed coarse-match and extreme-pair diagnostics, repaired completed-epoch streak scoping, and decisively closed the exact underlying mechanism without option-wrapper salvage.

useful_deltas.summary: Added an exact-byte Federal Reserve Beige Book archive/calendar loader, strict official-time parser, lag-safe prior-only matched-control range lab, sealed chronological holdout, deterministic replay, and positive/negative synthetic controls.

The unchanged train-only decision has 55 matched pairs across eight years and 98.2143% support; mean compression after the 20-bps hurdle is +0.252727% and LB90 is +0.009919%, but only 27/55 pairs are positive (49.0909%), so the frozen >=55% consistency gate fails and the exact family closes before holdout or option pricing.
Persisted count/min/median/max match-distance summaries plus explicit >252-session and absolute >5%-compression diagnostic counts, while keeping them diagnostic-only and outside the frozen gate set.

Bound completed search-epoch record and no-advance streak scoping inclusively through completed_stamp so later independent wakes remain visible globally but cannot be silently counted inside the completed FOMC epoch.

Quarantined both canonical Beige Book IDs, retained the completed FOMC epoch as one-decision context, and replaced the blocked CPI-by-default seed with one explicit two-close macro-lane pivot reassessment without opening either sealed holdout or starting a successor epoch early.

data_dependencies: No new data are required to preserve this exact Beige Book family close; reopening requires a materially different mechanism or evidence class rather than threshold, horizon, neutral-regime, control, direction, or option-wrapper retuning.

A CPI successor, if chosen after reassessment, requires an accessible official prior-known release/surprise source with explicit coverage and fail-closed timestamp semantics before any outcome read; current BLS retrieval was HTTP 403 in this environment.
Any later option strategy requires a separate option-stage charter and claim-appropriate observed/calibrated quote evidence before L1 or paper authority.
